positioning.es: Sistemas premium de fixtures retail, estanterias de supermercado y equipos de almacen para proyectos B2B globales

tagline.zh: 零售基础设施 · 全球信赖 · 始于1990
tagline.fr: Infrastructure Retail. La confiance mondiale depuis 1990.
tagline.ru: Розничная инфраструктура. Глобальное доверие с 1990 года.
tagline.ja: リテールインフラ。1990年から世界中で信頼されています。
tagline.ar: البنية التحتية للبيع بالتجزئة. ثقة عالمية منذ 1990.
tagline.tr: Perakende Altyapısı. 1990'dan beri dünya çapında güveniliyor.
tagline.th: โครงสร้างพื้นฐานค้าปลีก เชื่อถือทั่วโลกตั้งแต่ปี 1990
tagline.vi: Hạ tầng bán lẻ. Tin cậy toàn cầu từ năm 1990.

kicker.th: 36 ปีแห่งการผลิต

title.en: Retail Infrastructure for Supermarket Chains Worldwide.
title.zh: 为全球连锁商超打造零售基础设施
title.es: Infraestructura retail para cadenas de supermercados.
title.fr: Infrastructure retail pour les chaînes de supermarchés.
title.it: Infrastrutture retail per catene di supermercati globali.
title.ru: Розничная инфраструктура для супермаркетов по всему миру.
title.pt: Infraestrutura retail para cadeias de supermercados globais.
title.ja: 世界中のスーパーマーケットチェーン向けリテールインフラ。
title.ko: 전세계 슈퍼마켓 체인을 위한 리테일 인프라.
title.ar: بنية تحتية للبيع بالتجزئة لسلاسل السوبر ماركت حول العالم.
title.tr: Dünya çapındaki süpermarket zincirleri için perakende altyapısı.
title.th: โครงสร้างพื้นฐานค้าปลีกสำหรับเชนซูเปอร์มาร์เก็ตทั่วโลก
title.vi: Hạ tầng bán lẻ cho chuỗi siêu thị toàn cầu.
title.hi: वैश्विक सुपरमार्केट चेन के लिए रिटेल इन्फ्रास्ट्रक्चर।

sub.en: Supermarket shelving, shopping trolleys, warehouse racks and 150+ retail fixture SKUs. Drawing-based customization for chain rollout projects.
sub.zh: 商超货架、购物车、仓储架等 150+ 零售设备 SKU。支持连锁项目图纸定制。
sub.de: Supermarktregale, Einkaufswagen, Lagerregale und 150+ Retail-Fixture-SKUs. Custom-Fertigung nach Zeichnung.
sub.es: Estanterías, carros y racks. 150+ SKUs. Personalización por planos.

ctaPrimary.th: ดูแคตตาล็อก

ctaGhost.th: ขอใบเสนอราคา

title.en: Shopping Trolleys, Baskets, Carts & Logistics Carriers.
title.zh: 购物车、购物篮、物流推车一体化方案

sub.en: 45+ shopping trolley models, 24+ basket designs, roll containers and pallets. Logo customization and export packing standard.
sub.zh: 45+ 款购物车型号、24+ 款购物篮、滚笼与托盘。LOGO 定制 + 出口包装标配。
sub.es: 45+ modelos de carros, 24+ diseños de cestas, contenedores y palets.

title.en: From Concept to Container. Full Project Service.
title.zh: 从设计到货柜 · 完整项目服务
title.de: Vom Konzept zum Container. Voller Projekt-Service.
title.es: Del Concepto al Contenedor. Servicio Completo.

sub.en: In-house steel fabrication, powder coating and QC. 10 production lines, 18,505㎡ facility. Export packing and project documentation included.
sub.zh: 自有钢结构焊接、粉末喷涂、QC 检验。10 条产线、18,505 ㎡ 厂区。含出口包装与项目资料。
sub.de: Hauseigene Stahlfertigung, Pulverbeschichtung und QC. 10 Produktionslinien.
sub.es: Fabricación de acero, pintura en polvo y QC propios. 10 líneas, 18,505㎡.

label.th: พื้นที่โรงงาน
สายการผลิต
สัดส่วนส่งออก

desc.en: Founded 1990 in Suzhou. Three decades of supermarket shelving and retail fixture engineering. Stable team, proven process.
desc.zh: 1990 年于苏州创立。三十六年专注商超货架与零售设备工程。团队稳定、工艺成熟。
desc.de: Gegründet 1990 in Suzhou. Drei Jahrzehnte Supermarktregal-Engineering.
desc.es: Fundada en 1990 en Suzhou. Tres décadas de ingeniería de estanterías.

desc.en: Custom dimensions, structures, accessories and powder-coat finishes for chain store rollout projects. Tech drawing review in 48h.
desc.zh: 支持连锁项目所需的尺寸、结构、配件与喷涂色定制。48h 内完成技术图纸评审。
desc.de: Custom Abmessungen, Strukturen, Zubehör für Retail-Rollouts.
desc.es: Medidas, estructuras y acabados a medida para proyectos retail.

desc.en: Raw material identification, QA/QC inspectors at welding/coating/packing stages. Reduces project delivery risk.
desc.zh: 原材料识别、焊接/喷涂/包装环节 QA/QC 检验。降低项目交付风险。
desc.es: Identificación de materiales, QA/QC en soldadura/recubrimiento/embalaje.

desc.en: Experienced export team. Specification review, sample confirmation and rollout communication in days, not weeks.
desc.zh: 成熟外贸团队。规格确认、样品验证、项目沟通以天计而非周计。
desc.es: Equipo exportador. Confirmación de especificaciones en días.

desc.en: Designed for global B2B buyers. Active distributor and chain-store rollout clients across Europe, North America, Oceania and South America.
desc.zh: 为全球 B2B 采购商设计。欧洲、北美、大洋洲、南美均有活跃分销商与连锁项目客户。
desc.de: Aktive Händler in Europa, Nordamerika, Ozeanien, Südamerika.
desc.es: Distribuidores activos en Europa, Norteamérica, Oceanía y Sudamérica.

desc.en: Plywood crates, foam protection, container-loading optimization. Direct FCL/LCL shipping support from Shanghai and Ningbo ports.
desc.zh: 胶合板木箱、泡沫防撞、装柜优化。支持上海、宁波港 FCL/LCL 直发。
desc.es: Cajas de madera, protección, optimización de contenedores.

layers.en: 2-4 LAYERS configurable + galvanized teardrop-slot posts + galvanized step-beam crossbeams + SLATTED BAR-GRATE shelves (parallel horizontal welded steel bars spaced 30-50mm — allows cold air circulation, prevents frost build-up on goods bottoms — industry-standard cold-storage shelf design) + galvanized X-bracing on sides + cold-resistant zinc plating throughout — specifically engineered for COLD STORAGE / FREEZER WAREHOUSES (-25°C), suitable for frozen food, cold-chain logistics, pharmaceutical cold storage, fresh produce warehouses
layers.zh: 2-4 层可定制 + 镀锌泪滴孔立柱 + 镀锌阶梯式横梁 + 栅格层板（水平焊接钢条间距 30-50mm，冷气可循环、防止商品底部结冰 — 冷库行业标准设计）+ 镀锌 X 形对角斜撑 + 全身抗低温镀锌处理 — 专为冷库 / 冷冻库（-25°C）设计，适用冷冻食品、冷链物流、医药冷库、生鲜仓库

layers.en: 2-3 walkable mezzanine FLOORS with rack bays on each floor + BLUE steel staircase with handrails (ground-to-mezzanine access) + BLUE perimeter SAFETY GUARDRAIL (worker fall protection) + ORANGE checkered-plate flooring on mezzanine platform (anti-slip) + RED step-beam crossbeams + BLUE teardrop-slot posts running full height + optional cargo elevator integration + perimeter ladder + ideal for high-ceiling warehouses (6-9m) needing to DOUBLE OR TRIPLE storage capacity using vertical space — e-commerce fulfillment, wholesale distribution, parts/auto/hardware warehouses, archive storage
layers.zh: 2-3 层可走人阁楼楼面，每层都有货架货位 + 蓝色钢制楼梯带扶手（从地面通往阁楼平台）+ 蓝色周边安全护栏（工人防坠）+ 橙色花纹钢板楼面（防滑工业地板）+ 红色阶梯式横梁 + 蓝色泪滴孔立柱贯穿全高 + 可选货物提升电梯 + 周边爬梯 + 适合层高 6-9 米的大型仓库利用垂直空间实现存储面积 2-3 倍翻倍 — 适用电商履约、批发配送、汽配/五金/零件仓库、档案存储

layers.en: Continuous OSB TOP CANOPY panel running full length + 2 open OSB shelves on each long side (4 shelves per bay, both sides visible) + 1 base ground level shelf + closed OSB STORAGE CABINET section at the base (with hinged doors, 1/3 of total height) + 2-3 bay long-row configuration + black tube frame with arched corners (Brooklyn loft / Edison cafe vintage industrial style) — ideal for boutique retail CENTER ISLAND placement (cafés, fashion stores, bookstores, wine shops, cultural & creative stores, premium retail) where customers shop from both sides; low H1400 design preserves cross-store sightlines

layers.en: 4 open light-wood shelves on the upper portion (evenly spaced) + 1 closed light-wood STORAGE CABINET at the bottom (single hinged door) + full-height light-wood back panel + black square tube frame with FULLY ROUNDED CORNERS throughout (Scandinavian minimalism aesthetic) — ideal for narrow aisles, corner placements, small boutique stores, cafés, tea shops, fashion boutiques, bookstores, B&B / homestay sample rooms, home-living showrooms (lighter softer Nordic aesthetic vs vintage industrial S036/S037)
layers.zh: 上部 4 层浅木开放层板（等距分布）+ 底部 1 个浅木封闭储物柜带门 + 满背板浅木设计 + 方管钢框架全身圆角处理（北欧极简美学）— 适合窄通道、墙角放置、小型精品店、咖啡店、茶饮店、服装精品店、书店、民宿/酒店样品间、家居样品展厅（北欧浅色温润美学，区别于 S036/S037 的复古工业风）

layers.en: 5 LEVELS per side (10 shelf surfaces total) + continuous deep-wood back panel spine + deep-wood kickplate base running full length + slim minimalist black steel posts at each bay junction + supports 3-5 bay long-row aisle configuration — premium high-end retail for wine shops, cigar stores, luxury supermarkets, Chinese herb pharmacies, specialty tea stores, premium baby products, dietary supplements, gift packaging stores (warm mahogany gravitas vs cold metal shelves)

layers.en: DEFINING FLAGSHIP FEATURE: Art Deco / geometric lattice BLACK METAL CUTOUT CROWN on top (full-width decorative panel, ~150mm tall, laser-cut openwork pattern) + 5 OPEN amber-wood shelves + 1 closed amber-wood STORAGE CABINET at the bottom (per bay, hinged doors) + full-height amber-wood back panel + slim black steel posts — flagship statement piece for luxury boutique entrances, focal walls, premium cosmetic counters, high-end wine / tea / cigar showrooms, designer hotels lobby retail, gift packaging stores
layers.zh: 旗舰款标志特征：顶部 Art Deco / 几何格子黑色金属激光切割艺术镂空顶饰（全宽装饰面板高约 150mm，激光切割镂空图案）+ 5 层暖木开放层板 + 底部 1 个暖木封闭储物柜带门（每组）+ 满背板暖木 + 窄黑钢立柱 — 旗舰造势单品，适合奢侈品店入口、墙面焦点位、高端化妆品柜台、红酒/茶叶/雪茄会所、设计师酒店大堂礼品店、礼盒店

layers.en: THREE-ZONE DESIGN: (1) TOP white metal SLATWALL panel for hanging earring cards; (2) MIDDLE amber-wood top tray divided into 8 square compartments for rings/earrings/brooches; (3) BOTTOM 2 hinged storage drawers + slim white metal table legs — ideal jewelry boutique solution for jewelry shops, silverware stores, accessories sections, market stalls, pop-up stands, holiday gift counters
layers.zh: 三区设计：(1) 顶部白色金属横槽板（挂耳环卡/项链卡）；(2) 中部暖木顶盘分 8 格（戒指/耳钉/胸针小件饰品分隔陈列）；(3) 底部 2 个储物抽屉带门（备货补货）+ 窄白色金属腿 — 首饰店一站式陈列工具，适合首饰店、银饰店、文创店、配饰区、集市摊位、快闪店、节日礼品柜台

layers.en: TWO-PIECE L-CONFIGURATION: (1) MAIN UNIT for cashier station (POS, register, scanner) with under-counter OSB storage cabinet (2 hinged doors); (2) PAY UNIT for customer bagging area and card terminal with under-counter OSB storage cabinet (2 hinged doors); both at standard ergonomic counter height H850mm; adjustable feet for floor leveling — matches S036/S037 vintage industrial wood shelves for complete vintage cafe / boutique supermarket / specialty store turn-key fit-out
layers.zh: 两件式 L 形组合：(1) 主台 收银员操作台（POS、收银机、扫码）带底部 OSB 储物柜（2 门）；(2) 付台 顾客打包/刷卡区带底部 OSB 储物柜（2 门）；两台同高 H850mm 符合人体工学站立操作；调节脚找平 — 与 S036/S037 vintage 工业风钢木货架完美配套，构成精品超市/咖啡馆/精品店整店交钥匙方案

layers.en: 3 LEVELS of REAR-TILTED 15-20 degree angled OSB TRAY SHELVES on the upper portion (each tray has raised front + back retaining lips, holds packaged snack items facing-out for customer visibility) + 1 LARGE DEEP OSB DUMP BIN at the bottom (open-top container for bulk loose snacks, nuts, candies, dried fruit, granola — customers scoop directly) + slim black steel posts visible through layers (vintage industrial assembly aesthetic) + wooden kickplate base — ideal merchandising solution for specialty grocery snack zones, imported snack stores, bulk food retailers, cultural-creative snack shops, bakery side displays, healthy food stores
layers.zh: 上部 3 层 15-20° 后倾 OSB 斗盘层板（每盘前后双立挡防滚落，承载袋装零食/饼干/糖果包装正面朝外展示）+ 底部 1 个大型开口 OSB 散装斗（散装坚果/糖果/果干/麦片直接堆放，顾客自取）+ 立柱穿透层板的拼装结构（vintage 工业组装美学）+ 木质底踢脚板 — 精品超市零食区、进口零食店、散装食品店、文创零食店、烘焙店配套、健康食品店的销售神器

layers.en: 4 LEVELS of flat OSB shelves (no front retaining lip for open shoe access) + evenly-spaced ~280mm gaps for shoe boxes + NO back panel (fully open structure, view-through visibility) + black tube frame with arched corners + small adjustable feet — low H1220 height ideal for shoe stores, children's shoe shops, sports shoe stores, slipper shops, market shoe stalls — works as freestanding island or against-wall placement
layers.zh: 4 层平整 OSB 层板（无前挡条方便取鞋）+ 等距 280mm 间隙容鞋盒 + 无背板（前后通透开放式）+ 圆管弧形顶角框架 + 调节脚 — 矮款 H1220 鞋店俯视陈列黄金高度，适合鞋店、童鞋店、运动鞋店、拖鞋店、集市鞋摊 — 可作独立岛屿或贴墙摆放

layers.en: 3-TIER PYRAMID arrangement with progressively smaller tabletops stacked from bottom to top (wedding-cake silhouette) + each tier is an open-top tray (raised perimeter lip prevents items rolling off) + independent black steel leg frame per tier — designed for high-impact promotional display at store entrances or main aisles, perfect for highlighting hero products / new arrivals / seasonal items / best-sellers in 3 hierarchical levels (bottom = volume sellers, middle = popular, top = flagship single item)
layers.zh: 3 层金字塔从下到上递减堆叠（婚礼蛋糕造型）+ 每层托盘式桌面带四周浅立挡（防滑落）+ 每层独立黑色钢腿框架 — 为店铺入口/主通道高冲击促销陈列设计，主推单品/新品/季节/明星款的 3 层等级展示（底层走量、中层热销、顶层旗舰）

layers.en: 5 LEVELS of flat OSB shelves (no front retaining lip, no back panel for open visibility) + black steel TRAPEZOIDAL side frames (wider at bottom, narrower at top — A-frame structure providing stability while saving material vs rectangular frame) + small adjustable feet — economy entry-tier with maximum display capacity (5 shelves in compact narrow footprint) for small boutique stores, market stalls, pop-up shops, secondary positions in apparel/home/lifestyle stores
layers.zh: 5 层平整 OSB 层板（无前挡条、无背板，开放式视野）+ 黑色钢梯型侧框（下宽上窄 A 形结构，比矩形框架更稳更省材）+ 调节脚 — 经济入门款最大容量（5 层紧凑浅深）适合小型精品店、集市摊位、快闪店、服装/家居/生活店次要位

layers.en: Central OSB cross-shaped back panel splits the square footprint into 4 quadrants; each of 4 sides has multiple OSB shelves cantilevered out, STAGGERED at different vertical heights in a WINDMILL / PINWHEEL pattern (shelves on adjacent sides interlock without colliding at corners, creating 3D visual rotation) + slim black steel corner posts with multi-hole height adjustment + black adjustable feet — 360-degree boutique island display for cosmetics, accessories, gifts, books, snacks, fashion add-ons; customers see different merchandise from every angle (higher conversion than uniform 4-side displays)
layers.zh: 中央 OSB 十字背板把正方占地分隔为 4 个象限；每面层板多层悬臂式分布，各面高度错落呈风车 / 旋转风车造型（相邻面层板互相交错不在边角碰撞，形成 3D 视觉旋转）+ 黑色钢角柱多孔高度可调 + 黑色调节脚 — 360° 精品店岛屿陈列，适合化妆品/护肤、配饰、礼品、书籍、零食、服装配饰；顾客绕一圈每个角度看到不同陈列（比统一 4 面陈列转化率高）

layers.en: THREE-ZONE DESIGN: (1) TOP TWO ANGLED 25-degree BACKBOARDS (one per cashier station, for card terminals/receipt printers/signage); (2) MIDDLE wide flat working counter + 2 DRAWERS (one per station for cash bags/small items/pens); (3) BOTTOM 4 open storage cubbies in 2x2 arrangement (for packing bags/receipt rolls/restock items) + adjustable feet — TWO-STATION layout for high-traffic checkout flow (small supermarkets, convenience stores, baby/mother stores, cosmetics, stationery shops)
layers.zh: 三区设计：(1) 顶部 2 个 25° 斜面立挡（每工位一个，放刷卡机/单据架/小招牌）；(2) 中部 宽工作台面 + 2 抽屉（每工位一个收银员小物）；(3) 底部 4 个开放储物格 2×2 布局（备货/打包袋/小票卷纸）+ 调节脚 — 双工位高峰客流分流（中小超市、便利店、母婴店、化妆品店、文具店）

layers.en: Central cross-shaped wood back panel divides square footprint into 4 equal quadrants + 4 LEVELS of square uniform-size shelves (all same L600x600 size — uniform square tower silhouette, distinguishes from pyramid designs) + square base bottom doubles as kickplate + NO front retaining lips (open access from all 4 sides) + NO doors + modular height extension (each added level = +35cm) — ideal for baby/mother stores, cosmetics, stationery shops, small supermarket center display, market stalls, school supplies

layers.en: Single large flat rectangular tabletop + insertable CENTRAL PARTITIONED TRAY divided into 18 square compartments (3 rows x 6 cols) for category-separated bulk display (nuts, candies, dried fruit, small produce, baby items) + wide perimeter border around the tray for additional packaged goods/signage/scoops + 4 chunky black metal corner legs — ultra-low H500 designed for ABOVE-DOWN browsing of bulk goods (customers naturally look down to pick from compartments) — ideal for bulk-food retailers, farmers markets, grocery store entrance impulse displays, baby/mother stores small-items section, candy shops, tea/herb specialty stores
layers.zh: 整体平整矩形大桌面 + 可插入式中央 18 格分隔盘（3 排 × 6 列方形分格，分类装散装坚果/糖果/果干/小件果蔬/婴儿小物）+ 分格盘四周宽边可平铺包装商品/标签牌/取勺 + 4 根黑色方管金属粗腿 — 超矮 H500 让顾客自然俯视挑选散装小物（转化率比立式货架高），适合散装食品店、农夫市场、超市入口爆款散装陈列、母婴小件区、糖果店、茶叶/干货专柜

layers.en: 3 SQUARE WIRE-MESH BASKETS stacked vertically with progressively smaller size from bottom to top (wedding-cake pyramid silhouette) + slightly flared rim opening (trapezoid cross-section) + welded ~25mm wire grid mesh on all 4 sides + central pole connecting all 3 baskets + TOP DECORATIVE RING FINIAL (for hanging signage / staff handle) + square base platform + 4 BLACK RUBBER CASTER WHEELS (mobile - rollable across store floor) — ideal for bulk merchandising (nuts/candies/dried fruit/loose snacks), promotional impulse displays at store entrance, fashion accessories, towels, small gift items; mobile design allows quick repositioning for seasonal promotions
layers.zh: 3 层方形钢丝网篮垂直叠放从下到上直径递减（金字塔/婚礼蛋糕造型）+ 篮口微外撇（梯型截面）+ 4 面 25mm 焊接钢丝网格 + 中央立柱穿连 3 层 + 顶部装饰圆环 finial（挂标签或服务员手提）+ 方形底座 + 4 个黑色橡胶脚轮（移动式 — 可在店内推动）— 适合散装陈列（坚果/糖果/果干/散装零食）、店铺入口冲动促销陈列、服装配饰、毛巾、小件礼品；移动设计便于季节性促销快速调整位置

layers.en: 3 RECTANGULAR wire-mesh baskets (ALL SAME SIZE L600 x W470 — higher capacity than M001 pyramid design) + each basket TILTED REARWARD at 15-degree angle (front edge lower, back higher — allows above-down full view of contents) + welded 25mm wire grid on all 4 sides + DUAL SIDE POSTS (left and right, NOT central) for higher stability and load capacity + rectangular base + 4 black caster wheels — high-capacity mobile merchandiser for bulk snacks, towels, stationery, toys, sauces, market stalls; capacity ~3x larger than YD-M001
layers.zh: 3 层矩形钢丝网篮（同尺寸 L600×W470，容量是 M001 金字塔款的 3 倍）+ 每层向后倾斜 15°（前低后高 — 顾客俯视一眼看全部内容物）+ 4 面 25mm 焊接钢丝网格 + 左右双立柱（非中央单柱 — 稳定性与承重更高）+ 矩形底座 + 4 个黑色脚轮 — 大容量移动陈列架，适合散装零食、毛巾、文具、玩具、调味料、集市摊位；容量是 YD-M001 的 3 倍

layers.en: 4 vertical wire-grid panels facing N/S/E/W (square prism tower with 360-degree hanging surface) + welded 50mm square mesh openings (compatible with standard wire-grid hooks: S-hooks, peg arms, basket holders) + 4 black corner posts + NO shelves, NO layers, NO doors (pure hanging-merchandise tower) + 4 black caster wheels — 360-degree mobile merchandiser for fashion accessories, hardware tools, stationery, toys, hand-made crafts, baby items; provides 4x display area in small footprint

layers.en: 4 silver-white wire grid panels facing N/S/E/W with closely-spaced horizontal rails (compatible with both wire-grid hooks AND slatwall-style hooks: S-hooks, peg arms, basket holders, hanging cards) + 4 silver corner posts + CENTRAL ROTATING SPINDLE BASE (entire tower rotates 360-degrees on heavy-duty bearing — customers spin to view all sides) + 5-leg star base plate with 5 multi-directional caster wheels (dual mobility: rotate + roll) — slim tall H1900 tower for boutique cosmetic counters, fashion accessories, stationery shops, gift stores, market stalls; visual presence stronger than M003 + interactive rotation engages customers

layers.en: 4 silver-white wire grid panels facing N/S/E/W with closely-spaced 50mm openings + silver METAL TOP CAP plate (closes the tower top, prevents dust accumulation — distinguishes M005 from M004 open-top) + 4 corner posts + CENTRAL ROTATING SPINDLE BASE (360-degree rotation on bearing) + 5-leg star base with 5 caster wheels (with brakes) — ULTRA-SLIM L300×W300 footprint (only 1/3 of M004's L530 footprint) at H1720 tall — designed for narrow spaces: small boutiques, narrow aisles, corner placements, beside-checkout add-on display, cosmetic counter accessories, market stalls, holiday gift pop-ups
layers.zh: 4 面银白色铁丝网格分别朝向 N/S/E/W，50mm 密集网格 + 银色金属顶盖板（封顶防尘 — M005 与 M004 开顶款的关键差异）+ 4 角立柱 + 中央旋转轴底座（360° 旋转）+ 5 脚星形底盘带 5 个万向脚轮（带刹车）— 超窄占地 L300×W300（仅 M004 L530 占地的 1/3）H1720 高款，适合窄空间：小型精品店、窄通道、墙角放置、收银台旁配套陈列、化妆品柜台配饰、集市摊位、节日礼品快闪

layers.en: 3 white perforated metal panels in TRIANGULAR PRISM arrangement (3 sides meeting at 3 corner edges) + dense 5mm round hole pattern (compatible with PEGBOARD HOOKS — short round-tip hooks, price-tag cards, small accessory holders) + silver TOP CAP plate (closes the tower, prevents dust) + 3 corner posts + CENTRAL ROTATING SPINDLE BASE (360-degree rotation) + 5-leg star base with 5 caster wheels — premium variant of M005 wire-grid tower: solid clean panel face focuses customer attention on merchandise (vs wire-grid see-through), ideal for cosmetics counters, fashion accessories, gift stores, premium stationery, baby boutiques

layers.en: 4 black perforated metal panels in SQUARE PRISM arrangement (4 sides meeting at 4 corner edges) + dense 5mm round hole pattern (compatible with PEGBOARD HOOKS — short round-tip hooks, price-tag cards, small accessory holders) + black TOP CAP plate (closes the tower, prevents dust) + 4 corner posts + CENTRAL ROTATING SPINDLE BASE (360-degree rotation) + 5-leg star base with 5 caster wheels — 4-sided high-capacity variant of M006 (3-sided white) with all-black industrial aesthetic, ideal for hardware tool displays, auto parts, electronics accessories, fashion (urban/streetwear), bookshop end-caps, men's grooming products

layers.en: 5 LEVELS of rectangular wire baskets on FRONT side + 5 LEVELS of rectangular wire baskets on BACK side (10 baskets total — high capacity) + each basket TILTED REARWARD at 15-degree angle (above-down view of contents) + welded 25mm wire mesh + central upright support frame (vertical post separating two sides) + rectangular base + 4 caster wheels — DOUBLE-SIDED mobile bulk merchandiser with capacity 4-5x that of single-side baskets (M001/M002); ideal for large supermarket bulk-snack islands, fashion store towels/underwear, stationery shops, toy stores, grocery store impulse displays
layers.zh: 前面 5 层 + 后面 5 层共 10 个矩形钢丝网篮（容量超大）+ 每篮向后倾斜 15°（俯视看全部内容物）+ 焊接 25mm 钢丝网格 + 中央立柱支撑（前后两侧分隔）+ 矩形底座 + 4 个脚轮 — 双面移动散装陈列，容量是单面网篮架（M001/M002）的 4-5 倍，适合大型超市散装零食岛、服装店毛巾/内衣、文具店、玩具店、超市冲动促销陈列

material.en: Electro-galvanized steel wire mesh basket (Φ4-5mm vertical + Φ3-4mm horizontal wires, MIG-welded grid) + heavy-duty zinc-plated steel chassis with elongated streamlined American profile + injection-molded plastic handle grips and corner end caps + nested-stacking design
material.zh: 电镀锌钢丝网筐体（Φ4-5mm 竖丝 + Φ3-4mm 横丝，MIG 焊接网格）+ 加强镀锌钢制底盘（美式加长流线型轮廓）+ 注塑塑料把手与端帽 + 嵌套堆叠设计
material.de: Elektroverzinktes Stahldrahtgitterkorb (Φ4-5mm vertikale + Φ3-4mm horizontale Drähte, MIG-geschweißt) + verstärktes verzinktes Stahlfahrwerk im verlängerten amerikanischen Stromlinienprofil + spritzgegossene Kunststoffgriffe und Eckkappen + stapelbares Design
material.es: Cesta de malla de alambre de acero electrogalvanizado (Φ4-5mm vertical + Φ3-4mm horizontal, soldadura MIG) + chasis de acero galvanizado reforzado con perfil americano alargado aerodinámico + asas y tapas de esquina de plástico inyectado + diseño anidable
material.fr: Electro-galvanized steel wire mesh basket (Φ4-5mm vertical + Φ3-4mm horizontal wires, MIG-welded grid) + heavy-duty zinc-plated steel chassis with elongated streamlined American profile + injection-molded plastic handle grips and corner end caps + nested-stacking design

layers.en: Single deep wire-mesh basket (60L capacity) + lower wire mesh tray for bulky items (bottled water, large packages) + integrated child seat with safety strap + 4 swivel TPR silent casters (Φ100mm)
layers.zh: 单层深筐网体（60 升容量）+ 底部金属线网托盘（放大件商品：瓶装水、大包装）+ 一体式儿童座椅 + 4 个万向 TPR 静音脚轮（Φ100mm）
layers.de: Einzelner tiefer Drahtkorb (60L Volumen) + unteres Drahtgitter-Tablett für sperrige Artikel + integrierter Kindersitz mit Sicherheitsgurt + 4 schwenkbare TPR-Leiserollen (Φ100mm)
layers.es: Cesta única profunda de malla (60L) + bandeja inferior de malla para artículos voluminosos + asiento infantil integrado con cinturón + 4 ruedas giratorias TPR silenciosas (Φ100mm)

material.en: Fine-grid electro-galvanized steel wire mesh basket (denser weave than Model-C, Phi 4mm vertical + Phi 3mm horizontal MIG-welded) + DOUBLE-DECK chassis design (upper wire tray PLUS lower platform) + heavy-duty zinc-plated steel chassis tubes with elongated streamlined American profile + injection-molded RED plastic handle bar and L-shaped corner end caps with built-in advertising slot + nested-stacking

basic.nameEn: 80L American Style Trolley Model-D
basic.nameZh: 80L 美式手推车 D 型

material.en: Fine-grid electro-galvanized steel wire mesh basket (denser weave than Model-C, Phi 4mm vertical + Phi 3mm horizontal MIG-welded) + DOUBLE-DECK chassis design (upper wire tray PLUS lower platform) + heavy-duty zinc-plated steel chassis tubes with elongated streamlined American profile + injection-molded RED plastic handle bar and L-shaped corner end caps with built-in advertising slot + nested-stacking
material.zh: 细密网格电镀锌钢丝筐体（比 C 型更密的编织，Phi 4mm 竖丝 + Phi 3mm 横丝 MIG 焊接）+ 双层底盘设计（上层金属网托盘 + 下层底板）+ 加强镀锌钢制底盘管材，美式加长流线型轮廓 + 注塑红色塑料把手与 L 形角端帽（含广告牌位）+ 嵌套堆叠设计
material.de: Feinmaschiger elektroverzinkter Stahldrahtkorb (dichter als Model-C, Phi 4mm vertikal + Phi 3mm horizontal MIG-geschweißt) + DOPPELDECK-Fahrwerk (obere Drahtablage PLUS untere Plattform) + verstärkte verzinkte Stahlrohre im verlängerten amerikanischen Profil + spritzgegossene ROTE Kunststoffgriffe und L-förmige Eckkappen mit Werbeschild-Slot + stapelbar
material.es: Cesta de malla de alambre electrogalvanizado de cuadrícula fina (más densa que Model-C, Phi 4mm vertical + Phi 3mm horizontal soldadura MIG) + chasis de DOBLE PLATAFORMA (bandeja superior MÁS plataforma inferior) + tubos de chasis de acero galvanizado reforzado con perfil americano alargado aerodinámico + asas y tapas L de plástico inyectado ROJAS con ranura publicitaria + diseño anidable

material.es: Cesta de malla de alambre electrogalvanizado de cuadrícula fina (más densa que Model-C, Phi 4mm vertical + Phi 3mm horizontal soldadura MIG) + chasis de DOBLE PLATAFORMA (bandeja superior MÁS plataforma inferior) + tubos de chasis de acero galvanizado reforzado con perfil americano alargado aerodinámico + asas y tapas L de plástico inyectado ROJAS con ranura publicitaria + diseño anidable
material.fr: Fine-grid electro-galvanized steel wire mesh basket (denser weave than Model-C, Phi 4mm vertical + Phi 3mm horizontal MIG-welded) + DOUBLE-DECK chassis design (upper wire tray PLUS lower platform) + heavy-duty zinc-plated steel chassis tubes with elongated streamlined American profile + injection-molded RED plastic handle bar and L-shaped corner end caps with built-in advertising slot + nested-stacking

layers.en: Deep wire-mesh main basket (100L capacity) + folding RED child seat with safety strap + DOUBLE-DECK lower chassis: upper wire tray for large bottled items + lower platform for oversized parcels + 4 swivel TPR silent casters (Phi 100mm) + integrated billboard slot on L-shaped corner caps for store branding
layers.zh: 深筐主网体（100 升容量）+ 可折叠红色儿童座椅（含安全带）+ 双层下盘：上层金属网托放大瓶装商品 + 下层底板放超大件包裹 + 4 个万向 TPR 静音脚轮（Phi 100mm）+ L 形角端帽自带广告牌位（贴超市 LOGO）

basic.nameEn: American Style Trolley Model-D Series (Double-Deck Chassis)
basic.nameZh: 美式手推车 D 型系列（双层底盘）

material.en: Fine-grid electro-galvanized steel wire mesh basket (denser weave than Model-C, Phi 4mm vertical + Phi 3mm horizontal MIG-welded) + DOUBLE-DECK chassis design (upper wire tray PLUS lower platform) + heavy-duty zinc-plated steel chassis tubes with elongated streamlined American profile + injection-molded RED plastic handle bar and L-shaped corner end caps with built-in advertising slot + nested-stacking
material.zh: 细密网格电镀锌钢丝筐体（比 C 型更密的编织，Phi 4mm 竖丝 + Phi 3mm 横丝 MIG 焊接）+ 双层底盘设计（上层金属网托盘 + 下层底板）+ 加强镀锌钢制底盘管材，美式加长流线型轮廓 + 注塑红色塑料把手与 L 形角端帽（含广告牌位）+ 嵌套堆叠设计

layers.en: Deep wire-mesh main basket (150L capacity) + folding RED child seat with safety strap + DOUBLE-DECK lower chassis: upper wire tray for large bottled items + lower platform for oversized parcels + 4 swivel TPR silent casters (Phi 125mm) + integrated billboard slot on L-shaped corner caps for store branding
layers.zh: 深筐主网体（150 升容量）+ 可折叠红色儿童座椅（含安全带）+ 双层下盘：上层金属网托放大瓶装商品 + 下层底板放超大件包裹 + 4 个万向 TPR 静音脚轮（Phi 125mm）+ L 形角端帽自带广告牌位（贴超市 LOGO）
layers.de: Tiefer Drahtkorb (150L) + klappbarer ROTER Kindersitz mit Sicherheitsgurt + DOPPELDECK-Unterbau: obere Drahtablage für große Flaschen + untere Plattform für Übergrößen + 4 schwenkbare TPR-Leiserollen (Phi 125mm) + integrierter Werbeschild-Slot an L-Eckkappen
layers.es: Cesta principal profunda (150L) + asiento infantil plegable ROJO con cinturón + chasis inferior de DOBLE PLATAFORMA: bandeja superior para botellas grandes + plataforma inferior para paquetes voluminosos + 4 ruedas giratorias TPR silenciosas (Phi 125mm) + ranura publicitaria integrada en las tapas L

basic.nameEn: 210L American Style Trolley Model-D
basic.nameZh: 210L 美式手推车 D 型

material.en: Fine-grid electro-galvanized steel wire mesh basket (denser weave than Model-C, Phi 4mm vertical + Phi 3mm horizontal MIG-welded) + DOUBLE-DECK chassis design (upper wire tray PLUS lower platform) + heavy-duty zinc-plated steel chassis tubes with elongated streamlined American profile + injection-molded RED plastic handle bar and L-shaped corner end caps with built-in advertising slot + nested-stacking
material.zh: 细密网格电镀锌钢丝筐体（比 C 型更密的编织，Phi 4mm 竖丝 + Phi 3mm 横丝 MIG 焊接）+ 双层底盘设计（上层金属网托盘 + 下层底板）+ 加强镀锌钢制底盘管材，美式加长流线型轮廓 + 注塑红色塑料把手与 L 形角端帽（含广告牌位）+ 嵌套堆叠设计
material.de: Feinmaschiger elektroverzinkter Stahldrahtkorb (dichter als Model-C, Phi 4mm vertikal + Phi 3mm horizontal MIG-geschweißt) + DOPPELDECK-Fahrwerk (obere Drahtablage PLUS untere Plattform) + verstärkte verzinkte Stahlrohre im verlängerten amerikanischen Profil + spritzgegossene ROTE Kunststoffgriffe und L-förmige Eckkappen mit Werbeschild-Slot + stapelbar
material.es: Cesta de malla de alambre electrogalvanizado de cuadrícula fina (más densa que Model-C, Phi 4mm vertical + Phi 3mm horizontal soldadura MIG) + chasis de DOBLE PLATAFORMA (bandeja superior MÁS plataforma inferior) + tubos de chasis de acero galvanizado reforzado con perfil americano alargado aerodinámico + asas y tapas L de plástico inyectado ROJAS con ranura publicitaria + diseño anidable

material.en: Fine-grid electro-galvanized steel wire mesh basket (denser weave than Model-C, Phi 4mm vertical + Phi 3mm horizontal MIG-welded) + DOUBLE-DECK chassis design (upper wire tray PLUS lower platform) + heavy-duty zinc-plated steel chassis tubes with elongated streamlined American profile + injection-molded RED plastic handle bar and L-shaped corner end caps with built-in advertising slot + nested-stacking
material.zh: 细密网格电镀锌钢丝筐体（比 C 型更密的编织，Phi 4mm 竖丝 + Phi 3mm 横丝 MIG 焊接）+ 双层底盘设计（上层金属网托盘 + 下层底板）+ 加强镀锌钢制底盘管材，美式加长流线型轮廓 + 注塑红色塑料把手与 L 形角端帽（含广告牌位）+ 嵌套堆叠设计
material.de: Feinmaschiger elektroverzinkter Stahldrahtkorb (dichter als Model-C, Phi 4mm vertikal + Phi 3mm horizontal MIG-geschweißt) + DOPPELDECK-Fahrwerk (obere Drahtablage PLUS untere Plattform) + verstärkte verzinkte Stahlrohre im verlängerten amerikanischen Profil + spritzgegossene ROTE Kunststoffgriffe und L-förmige Eckkappen mit Werbeschild-Slot + stapelbar
material.es: Cesta de malla de alambre electrogalvanizado de cuadrícula fina (más densa que Model-C, Phi 4mm vertical + Phi 3mm horizontal soldadura MIG) + chasis de DOBLE PLATAFORMA (bandeja superior MÁS plataforma inferior) + tubos de chasis de acero galvanizado reforzado con perfil americano alargado aerodinámico + asas y tapas L de plástico inyectado ROJAS con ranura publicitaria + diseño anidable

layers.en: Deep wire-mesh main basket (240L capacity) + folding RED child seat with safety strap + DOUBLE-DECK lower chassis: upper wire tray for large bottled items + lower platform for oversized parcels + 4 swivel TPR silent casters (Phi 125mm) + integrated billboard slot on L-shaped corner caps for store branding
layers.zh: 深筐主网体（240 升容量）+ 可折叠红色儿童座椅（含安全带）+ 双层下盘：上层金属网托放大瓶装商品 + 下层底板放超大件包裹 + 4 个万向 TPR 静音脚轮（Phi 125mm）+ L 形角端帽自带广告牌位（贴超市 LOGO）
layers.de: Tiefer Drahtkorb (240L) + klappbarer ROTER Kindersitz mit Sicherheitsgurt + DOPPELDECK-Unterbau: obere Drahtablage für große Flaschen + untere Plattform für Übergrößen + 4 schwenkbare TPR-Leiserollen (Phi 125mm) + integrierter Werbeschild-Slot an L-Eckkappen
layers.es: Cesta principal profunda (240L) + asiento infantil plegable ROJO con cinturón + chasis inferior de DOBLE PLATAFORMA: bandeja superior para botellas grandes + plataforma inferior para paquetes voluminosos + 4 ruedas giratorias TPR silenciosas (Phi 125mm) + ranura publicitaria integrada en las tapas L

basic.nameEn: 140L American Style Trolley Model-DF (Double-Deck Chrome)
basic.nameZh: 140L 美式手推车 DF 型（双层底盘镀铬）

material.en: Heavy-duty chrome-plated steel wire mesh basket (Phi 4-5mm vertical + Phi 3-4mm horizontal MIG-welded) + DOUBLE-DECK chrome chassis with mirror-bright finish + injection-molded RED plastic handle bar and L-shaped corner end caps + RED folding child seat + nested-stacking design

material.en: Two SEPARATE zinc-plated steel wire mesh baskets stacked vertically (upper basket at chest height + lower basket near floor) + bright galvanized steel vertical frame structure + RED plastic handle grips + zinc-plated TPR caster wheel stems + tall slim silhouette
material.zh: 两个独立镀锌钢丝网筐体上下叠放（上筐胸高 + 下筐近地面）+ 亮色镀锌钢制立柱框架 + 红色塑料把手 + 镀锌 TPR 脚轮立柱 + 高瘦造型
material.de: Zwei SEPARATE verzinkte Stahldrahtkörbe vertikal gestapelt (oberer Korb in Brusthöhe + unterer Korb bodennah) + verzinkte Stahl-Vertikalrahmen + ROTE Kunststoffgriffe + verzinkte TPR-Rollenstege + schlank-hohe Silhouette
material.es: Dos cestas SEPARADAS de malla galvanizada apiladas verticalmente (cesta superior a altura del pecho + cesta inferior cerca del suelo) + estructura vertical de acero galvanizado brillante + asas ROJAS de plástico + ruedas TPR con vástagos galvanizados + silueta alta y delgada

layers.en: UNIQUE TWO-BASKET DESIGN: upper shallow rectangular basket (~25L, ideal for fragile items/cold drinks) + lower shallow rectangular basket (~30L, for bulkier items) - both baskets fully independent with own mesh bottoms; 4 swivel TPR casters Phi 125mm (5-inch); designed for: convenience stores, airport duty-free shops, supermarket basket-style shopping where customers want to separate items by category
layers.zh: 独特的双篮设计：上层浅筐（约 25 升，适合放易碎品/冷饮）+ 下层浅筐（约 30 升，放大件商品）—— 两个筐完全独立，各自带网底；4 个万向 TPR 脚轮 Phi 125mm（5 英寸）；专为便利店、机场免税店、超市篮式购物场景设计，便于顾客分类摆放商品
layers.de: EINZIGARTIGES ZWEI-KORB-DESIGN: oberer flacher Rechteckkorb (~25L, ideal für zerbrechliche Artikel/Kaltgetränke) + unterer flacher Rechteckkorb (~30L, für größere Artikel) - beide Körbe unabhängig mit eigenen Maschenböden; 4 schwenkbare TPR-Rollen Phi 125mm; ideal für Convenience Stores, Duty-Free, korbbasierte Supermarkt-Einkaufsszenarien
layers.es: DISEÑO ÚNICO DE DOBLE CESTA: cesta superior poco profunda (~25L, ideal para artículos frágiles/bebidas frías) + cesta inferior poco profunda (~30L, para artículos voluminosos) - ambas independientes con mallas de fondo propias; 4 ruedas TPR giratorias Phi 125mm; diseñado para tiendas de conveniencia, duty-free, escenarios de cesta de supermercado

basic.nameEn: 80L Shopping Trolley Model-M (Double Wire Leg Reinforced Chassis)
basic.nameZh: 80L 手推车 M 型（双丝底架加强款）

material.en: Zinc-plated steel wire mesh basket (Phi 4-5mm vertical + Phi 3-4mm horizontal MIG-welded) + CRITICAL FEATURE: DOUBLE WIRE LEG chassis - front chassis legs use TWO PARALLEL steel wires welded side-by-side instead of single tube, providing reinforced load capacity and longer service life + RED plastic handle bar with end-grip caps + RED L-shaped corner end caps + RED folding child seat + nested-stacking design
material.zh: 镀锌钢丝网筐体（Phi 4-5mm 竖丝 + Phi 3-4mm 横丝 MIG 焊接）+ 关键特性：双丝底架（Double Wire Leg）—— 前部底架立柱采用两根并排焊接的钢丝替代单管，承重更强、使用寿命更长 + 红色塑料把手与端帽 + 红色 L 形角端帽 + 红色折叠儿童座椅 + 嵌套堆叠设计
material.de: Verzinkter Stahldrahtkorb (Phi 4-5mm vertikal + Phi 3-4mm horizontal MIG-geschweißt) + KRITISCHES MERKMAL: DOPPEL-DRAHT-BEINE Fahrwerk - Vorderbeine aus ZWEI PARALLELEN Stahldrähten statt Einzelrohr für verstärkte Tragfähigkeit und längere Lebensdauer + ROTE Kunststoffgriffe und Endkappen + ROTE L-Eckkappen + ROTER klappbarer Kindersitz + stapelbar
material.es: Cesta galvanizada de malla de alambre (Phi 4-5mm vertical + Phi 3-4mm horizontal soldadura MIG) + CARACTERISTICA CLAVE: chasis de DOBLE ALAMBRE - patas delanteras de DOS ALAMBRES de acero PARALELOS soldados en lugar de un solo tubo, capacidad de carga reforzada y mayor vida util + asas y tapas rojas + asiento infantil plegable ROJO + diseno anidable

basic.nameEn: 130L Shopping Trolley Model-M (Double Wire Leg Reinforced Chassis)
basic.nameZh: 130L 手推车 M 型（双丝底架加强款）

material.en: Zinc-plated steel wire mesh basket (Phi 4-5mm vertical + Phi 3-4mm horizontal MIG-welded) + CRITICAL FEATURE: DOUBLE WIRE LEG chassis - front chassis legs use TWO PARALLEL steel wires welded side-by-side instead of single tube, providing reinforced load capacity and longer service life + RED plastic handle bar with end-grip caps + RED L-shaped corner end caps + RED folding child seat + nested-stacking design
material.zh: 镀锌钢丝网筐体（Phi 4-5mm 竖丝 + Phi 3-4mm 横丝 MIG 焊接）+ 关键特性：双丝底架（Double Wire Leg）—— 前部底架立柱采用两根并排焊接的钢丝替代单管，承重更强、使用寿命更长 + 红色塑料把手与端帽 + 红色 L 形角端帽 + 红色折叠儿童座椅 + 嵌套堆叠设计
material.de: Verzinkter Stahldrahtkorb (Phi 4-5mm vertikal + Phi 3-4mm horizontal MIG-geschweißt) + KRITISCHES MERKMAL: DOPPEL-DRAHT-BEINE Fahrwerk - Vorderbeine aus ZWEI PARALLELEN Stahldrähten statt Einzelrohr für verstärkte Tragfähigkeit und längere Lebensdauer + ROTE Kunststoffgriffe und Endkappen + ROTE L-Eckkappen + ROTER klappbarer Kindersitz + stapelbar
material.es: Cesta galvanizada de malla de alambre (Phi 4-5mm vertical + Phi 3-4mm horizontal soldadura MIG) + CARACTERISTICA CLAVE: chasis de DOBLE ALAMBRE - patas delanteras de DOS ALAMBRES de acero PARALELOS soldados en lugar de un solo tubo, capacidad de carga reforzada y mayor vida util + asas y tapas rojas + asiento infantil plegable ROJO + diseno anidable

material.en: Zinc-plated steel wire mesh basket (Phi 4-5mm vertical + Phi 3-4mm horizontal MIG-welded) + CRITICAL FEATURE: DOUBLE WIRE LEG chassis - front chassis legs use TWO PARALLEL steel wires welded side-by-side instead of single tube, providing reinforced load capacity and longer service life + RED plastic handle bar with end-grip caps + RED L-shaped corner end caps + RED folding child seat + nested-stacking design
material.zh: 镀锌钢丝网筐体（Phi 4-5mm 竖丝 + Phi 3-4mm 横丝 MIG 焊接）+ 关键特性：双丝底架（Double Wire Leg）—— 前部底架立柱采用两根并排焊接的钢丝替代单管，承重更强、使用寿命更长 + 红色塑料把手与端帽 + 红色 L 形角端帽 + 红色折叠儿童座椅 + 嵌套堆叠设计
material.de: Verzinkter Stahldrahtkorb (Phi 4-5mm vertikal + Phi 3-4mm horizontal MIG-geschweißt) + KRITISCHES MERKMAL: DOPPEL-DRAHT-BEINE Fahrwerk - Vorderbeine aus ZWEI PARALLELEN Stahldrähten statt Einzelrohr für verstärkte Tragfähigkeit und längere Lebensdauer + ROTE Kunststoffgriffe und Endkappen + ROTE L-Eckkappen + ROTER klappbarer Kindersitz + stapelbar

basic.nameEn: 90L High-Leg Style Trolley (YD-NR-90L Elevated Chassis)
basic.nameZh: 90L 高脚手推车 YD-NR-90L（高架底盘）

material.en: Zinc-plated steel wire mesh basket with classic boxy upright profile + UNIQUE HIGH-LEG chassis design: four LONG STRAIGHT vertical chassis posts extending straight down from each basket corner to floor (NOT a standard short curved chassis), creating elevated stance similar to airport luggage cart frame + GREEN plastic handle grip + RED L-shaped corner end caps + nested-stacking

basic.nameEn: 190L Double Child Seats Family Trolley (YD-NR-190L Twin-Friendly)
basic.nameZh: 190L 双儿童座板手推车 YD-NR-190L（双胞胎家庭友好）

material.en: Zinc-plated heavy-duty steel wire mesh basket (190L deep boxy European profile) + UNIQUE TWIN-SEAT design: TWO RED folding child seats placed SIDE-BY-SIDE inside basket, each with own safety strap clip (NOT a single child seat - specifically engineered for families with twins or two young children) + RED handle bar with end-grip caps + RED L-shaped corner end caps + elevated long-leg chassis + nested-stacking
material.zh: 镀锌重型钢丝网筐体（190 升深筐欧式方正造型）+ 独特双座板设计：两个红色折叠儿童座椅并排放置于篮筐内（区别于单座设计），各自带独立安全带卡扣，专为双胞胎家庭或带两个幼儿的家长设计 + 红色把手与端帽 + 红色 L 形角端帽 + 高架长腿底盘 + 嵌套堆叠

material.en: UNIQUE 2-IN-1 DESIGN: FRONT plastic cartoon CHILD CAR (Cozy Coupe style, food-grade PP plastic) - PINK lower body + YELLOW arched roof with smiley face front + small plastic toy wheels (let kid sit inside and play); REAR metal shopping section with TWO STACKED zinc-plated wire-mesh baskets (Phi 4mm wire, MIG-welded) + BLUE powder-coated steel chassis frame + RED plastic handle bar with end-grip caps; 4 swivel TPR silent casters Phi 125mm (5-inch)
material.zh: 独特的 2 合 1 设计：前部塑料卡通儿童车厢（Cozy Coupe 经典造型，食品级 PP 塑料）—— 粉色车身 + 黄色拱形车顶 + 笑脸前脸 + 小塑料玩具轮（让孩子坐进去玩）；后部金属购物区双层叠放镀锌钢丝网筐（Phi 4mm 钢丝 MIG 焊接）+ 蓝色喷塑钢制底架 + 红色塑料把手与端帽；4 个万向 TPR 静音脚轮 Phi 125mm（5 英寸）
material.de: EINZIGARTIGES 2-IN-1-DESIGN: VORN Plastik-Cartoon-Kinderauto (Cozy-Coupe-Stil, lebensmittelechtes PP) - ROSA Unterteil + GELBES Bogendach mit Smiley-Front + kleine Plastik-Spielzeugräder (Kind sitzt darin); HINTEN Einkaufsbereich mit ZWEI gestapelten verzinkten Drahtkörben (Phi 4mm MIG-geschweißt) + BLAU pulverbeschichteter Stahlrahmen + ROTE Kunststoffgriffe; 4 schwenkbare TPR-Leiserollen Phi 125mm
material.es: DISENO UNICO 2-EN-1: DELANTE coche infantil de plastico tipo cartoon (estilo Cozy Coupe, PP grado alimentario) - cuerpo ROSA + techo abovedado AMARILLO con cara sonriente + ruedas pequenas de juguete (nino se sienta y juega); ATRAS seccion metalica con DOS cestas galvanizadas apiladas (Phi 4mm soldadura MIG) + chasis AZUL pintado en polvo + asas ROJAS; 4 ruedas giratorias TPR silenciosas Phi 125mm

layers.en: Plastic toy car compartment for child (max child weight 30 kg) + TWO independent stacked metal shopping baskets for parents (upper ~30L + lower ~30L = 60L total shopping capacity); ideal for hypermarkets, family supermarkets, baby/maternity stores - keeps kids engaged so parents can shop for an hour without fuss
layers.zh: 塑料车厢供孩子乘坐玩耍（最大儿童承重 30 公斤）+ 两个独立叠放金属购物筐供家长购物（上 ~30L + 下 ~30L = 60L 总购物容量）；专为大型超市、家庭超市、母婴店设计 —— 让孩子安静乘坐玩耍，家长可从容购物一小时不闹腾
layers.de: Plastik-Spielauto für Kind (max. 30 kg) + ZWEI unabhängige gestapelte Metalleinkaufskörbe für Eltern (oben ~30L + unten ~30L = 60L Gesamtkapazität); ideal für Hypermärkte, Familienmärkte, Baby-Märkte - hält Kinder eine Stunde lang beschäftigt
layers.es: Compartimento de juguete para nino (peso max. 30 kg) + DOS cestas metalicas apiladas independientes para padres (superior ~30L + inferior ~30L = 60L total); ideal para hipermercados, supermercados familiares, tiendas de maternidad - mantiene a los ninos entretenidos durante 1 hora

layers.es: Compartimento de juguete (max. 30 kg) + TRES cestas rosas en cascada para padres (~15L x 3 = 45L total, facil acceso a multiples alturas); diseno visual en cascada atrae a ninos y fomenta lealtad de compras familiares

material.en: Child-sized wire-mesh basket powder-coated in PINK or BLUE (color matches chassis frame and casters) + matching color powder-coated steel chassis + small red flag mounted on tall vertical pole rising from rear of cart (safety visibility for parents in crowded store) + plastic handle grips + smooth rounded child-safe edges (no sharp corners)
material.zh: 儿童尺寸钢丝网筐，粉色或蓝色喷塑（与底架、脚轮同色配色）+ 同色喷塑钢制底架 + 车后竖立长杆带红色小旗（家长在人群中追踪孩子安全可视）+ 塑料把手 + 圆角倒角儿童安全设计
material.de: Kindergroßer pulverbeschichteter Drahtkorb in ROSA oder BLAU (Farbe passt zu Rahmen und Rollen) + farblich passender Stahlrahmen + kleine rote Flagge auf hohem Heckmast (Sichtbarkeit für Eltern in vollen Läden) + Plastikgriffe + abgerundete kinderfreundliche Kanten
material.es: Cesta de malla tamano nino pintada en polvo ROSA o AZUL (color combina con chasis y ruedas) + chasis de acero pintado a juego + pequena bandera roja en mastil alto trasero (visibilidad para padres en tiendas concurridas) + asas de plastico + bordes redondeados seguros para ninos

material.en: Injection-molded RED plastic basket with ventilation slots (food-grade PP, NOT wire mesh - safer for very young kids, no exposed wire ends) + zinc-plated steel chassis + EXTRA-TALL adjustable safety flag pole (rises to 1480 mm total height) with WHITE rectangular flag featuring cute brown TEDDY BEAR cartoon graphic + dual side handles + smooth rounded child-safe edges
material.zh: 注塑红色塑料筐（带通风条孔，食品级 PP，区别于钢丝网更安全，无外露钢丝端头）+ 镀锌钢制底架 + 超长可调安全旗杆（总高 1480 mm）配白色长方形旗（印可爱棕色卡通泰迪熊）+ 双侧把手 + 圆角倒角儿童安全设计
material.de: Spritzgegossener ROTER Plastikkorb mit Lüftungsschlitzen (lebensmittelechtes PP statt Draht - sicherer für Kleinkinder, keine offenen Drahtenden) + verzinkter Stahlrahmen + EXTRA-LANGER verstellbarer Sicherheitsflaggen-Mast (1480 mm Gesamthöhe) mit weißer Flagge und braunem TEDDYBÄR-Cartoon + Seitengriffe + abgerundete sichere Kanten
material.es: Cesta plastica ROJA inyectada con ranuras de ventilacion (PP grado alimentario, no malla - mas seguro para ninos pequenos, sin extremos de alambre expuestos) + chasis de acero galvanizado + mastil de seguridad EXTRA-LARGO ajustable (altura total 1480 mm) con bandera blanca y OSITO de peluche marron + asas laterales + bordes redondeados seguros

basic.nameEn: Disassembly Roll Container YD-L001 (A-Style Logistics Cage)
basic.nameZh: 可拆装式物流台车 YD-L001（A 型）

material.en: Industry-standard Roll Container / Nest Cage design + TWO TALL VERTICAL ZINC-PLATED WIRE-MESH SIDE PANELS (left + right side walls, 1750mm tall) + zinc-plated wire-mesh bottom deck + DISASSEMBLY hinge connections at corners (panels detach from base for flat-pack storage when not in use) + reinforced steel tube frame + red brake lever on rear caster

basic.nameEn: Disassembly Roll Container YD-L002 (B-Style 3-Sided Enclosure)
basic.nameZh: 可拆装式物流台车 YD-L002（B 型三面封闭）

material.en: Industry-standard B-style Roll Container (CRITICAL DIFFERENTIATOR vs A-style L001): THREE tall vertical zinc-plated wire-mesh side panels forming U-shape enclosure (LEFT + BACK + RIGHT walls, only FRONT is open for loading/unloading) + zinc-plated wire-mesh bottom deck + DISASSEMBLY hinge connections at corners (panels detach from base for flat-pack storage) + reinforced steel tube frame
material.zh: 国际标准 B 型物流笼车（与 A 型 L001 的核心差异）：三片高立镀锌钢丝网侧片形成 U 形围合（左+背+右三面墙，仅前面开放装卸）+ 镀锌钢丝网底盘 + 角部可拆装铰链连接（侧片可与底座分离平铺存储）+ 加强钢管框架

layers.en: B-STYLE = 3-sided enclosure provides MORE SECURITY than A-style 2-sided (cargo cannot fall out the back during transport); preferred for fragile goods, e-commerce parcel sorting, returns processing, mixed-SKU picking; disassembly saves 70% storage space when not in use; complies with EUR/EN 13626
layers.zh: B 型 = 三面封闭提供比 A 型双面更高的安全性（运输中货物不会从后部滑出）；适合易碎品、电商包裹分拣、退货处理、混 SKU 拣货；可拆装节省 70% 存储空间；符合 EUR/EN 13626 标准

basic.nameEn: Roll Container Series (5 Models: 2/3/4-Sided + Lockable + XL Blue)
basic.nameZh: 物流台车系列（5 型：2/3/4 面 + 带锁 + 超大蓝色款）

material.en: Industry-standard C-style Roll Container (TOP-TIER vs A/B styles): FOUR zinc-plated wire-mesh side panels forming FULL ENCLOSURE - LEFT + BACK + RIGHT + FRONT (front is a hinged double-panel door for loading/unloading) + ONE REMOVABLE/ADJUSTABLE MIDDLE WIRE-MESH SHELF inside (height-adjustable, divides cargo into upper/lower compartments) + FOLDING design (side panels fold flat against base, saves 80% storage space, MORE COMPACT than A/B disassembly types) + zinc-plated wire-mesh bottom deck + reinforced steel frame + rear caster brake
material.zh: 国际标准 C 型物流笼车（A/B 型升级款）：四片镀锌钢丝网侧片全封闭围合 —— 左+背+右+前（前部为双页铰链门便于装卸）+ 中间一层可拆卸/可调高度的钢丝网架（分隔上下储物区）+ 折叠设计（侧片可贴合底座平铺，节省 80% 存储空间，比 A/B 拆装型更便捷）+ 镀锌钢丝网底盘 + 加强钢制框架 + 后脚轮带刹车

layers.en: TOP-TIER C-STYLE: full 4-sided enclosure (max security) + ADJUSTABLE MIDDLE SHELF (2-level picking capability, divide cargo by fragility/category) + FOLDING (vs disassembly = saves time on setup/teardown); ideal for e-commerce fulfillment centers, high-volume retail logistics, secure transport of fragile/high-value goods; complies with EUR/EN 13626
layers.zh: C 型顶配款：四面全封闭围合（安全等级最高）+ 可调中层（双层拣货能力，按易碎性/品类分隔）+ 折叠设计（比拆装更省安装/拆卸时间）；适合电商履约中心、大批量零售物流、易碎/高价值货物安全运输；符合 EUR/EN 13626

basic.nameEn: Folding Roll Container with Lockable Door YD-L004 (Security Flagship)
basic.nameZh: 封闭式物流台车 YD-L004（带锁前门安全旗舰款）

material.en: TOP-SECURITY Roll Container with LOCKABLE DOOR (FLAGSHIP vs A/B/C styles): FULL 4-sided enclosure with FRONT-OPENING HINGED DOUBLE DOOR (full-height, wardrobe-style) + visible CENTER LOCK MECHANISM (zinc-plated lock plate with upper and lower latches, padlock-compatible for anti-theft) + denser security-grade wire mesh (smaller mesh openings prevent hand reach-through) + FOLDING design (side panels fold flat against base when empty) + zinc-plated wire-mesh bottom deck + heavy-reinforced steel tube frame + rear-wheel brake
material.zh: 顶级安全等级物流笼带锁前门（旗舰款，A/B/C 型升级）：四面全封闭 + 前部全高双开铰链门（衣柜式）+ 中央锁机构（镀锌锁板带上下两组锁扣，可挂挂锁防盗）+ 加密安全级钢丝网（网孔更细，防止手伸入）+ 折叠设计（空车侧片可贴底平铺）+ 镀锌钢丝网底盘 + 重型加强钢制框架 + 后脚轮带刹车

layers.en: SECURITY FLAGSHIP positioning: lockable door is the KEY anti-theft feature (A/B/C styles cannot be locked); ideal for high-value cargo transport: electronics distribution (Apple/Samsung dealer logistics), pharmaceutical cold-chain, jewelry/precious metals, cross-city parcel delivery, hospital pharmacy back-office, bank cash handling; NO middle shelf preserves tall open space for long upright cargo (rolled carpets, cable reels, hanging garments)
layers.zh: 安全旗舰定位：带锁前门是核心防盗特性（A/B/C 型无法上锁）；适合高价值货物运输：电子产品配送（Apple/三星经销商物流）、医药冷链、珠宝/贵金属、跨城包裹、医院药房后场、银行现金管理；无中层保留竖向开阔空间装长形货物（卷地毯、电缆盘、挂装服饰）

material.en: SUPERMARKET CART STANDARD ANTI-THEFT COMPONENT: aerodynamic teardrop-shaped UV-stabilized food-grade ABS plastic housing (silver/light gray, weather-resistant) + RED rubber-coated metal key plug (ergonomic grip when inserting/removing) + CHROME-PLATED heavy-duty steel chain (12 links, withstands 200kg pull force, anti-rust) + brass coin-acceptor mechanism + zinc-alloy lock cylinder (master-key compatible for staff) + dual GREEN LED indicators (showing locked/unlocked status)
material.zh: 国际通用超市购物车防盗配件：水滴流线形 UV 稳定食品级 ABS 塑料外壳（银/浅灰，耐候）+ 红色橡胶包覆金属钥匙柄（插拔人体工学握感）+ 镀铬重型钢链（12 节，可承受 200 公斤拉力，防锈）+ 黄铜投币机构 + 锌合金锁芯（兼容店员万能钥匙）+ 双绿色 LED 指示灯（显示锁定/解锁状态）

layers.en: Customer workflow: 1) Insert coin into the slot to RELEASE the chain key from the previous cart; 2) Take the released cart and shop; 3) Return cart, re-insert chain key into next cart's lock to RETRIEVE the coin. ECONOMIC IMPACT: deters cart theft (avg 15-20% cart loss reduction), incentivizes cart return (saves staff collection labor ~30%), pays back in 6-12 months for medium supermarkets. Compliant with European DIN standard supermarket cart locks
layers.zh: 顾客使用流程：1) 投币入槽即可从前一辆车释放链条钥匙；2) 取车购物；3) 归还时将链条钥匙再次插入下一辆车锁中，取回硬币。经济效益：抑制偷车（平均减少 15-20% 购物车流失）、激励顾客主动归还（节省店员收车人力约 30%），中型超市 6-12 个月可收回投资。符合欧洲 DIN 标准超市购物车锁规范

capacityPerLayer.en: Coin compatibility: AUD $1/$2, NZD $1/$2, USD $0.25, ILS 5 NIS, GBP £1, EUR €0.50/€1/€2, CAD $1/$2 (specify region in order); chain pull rating 200 kg; lock retains coin until chain re-inserted; master-key system available for staff bulk-release; estimated lifespan 8-12 years in outdoor supermarket use

layers.en: MANDATORY SAFETY ACCESSORY for family-friendly supermarkets: prevents children falling out of cart child-seats (reduces child fall accidents by 90%, eliminates major liability claims); attaches via D-rings to cart child-seat frame; one-button SRB release for fast emergency egress; complies with EN 13209 / ASTM F2236 baby restraint standards
layers.zh: 亲子友好超市必备安全配件：防止儿童从购物车童椅跌落（减少 90% 儿童跌落事故，降低重大责任索赔风险）；通过 D 环固定到童椅框架；单按钮 SRB 释放便于紧急快速解开；符合 EN 13209 / ASTM F2236 婴儿安全带标准

layers.en: LARGEST in L-series (1100x800 footprint vs 850x700 for L001/L004): 30% more cargo volume than standard sizes; ideal for: cross-dock logistics (large bag/box transfer), e-commerce fulfillment XL parcels, beverage/snack distribution (full crate loads), industrial parts staging; blue powder finish provides corrosion resistance + brand identification for fleet management

basic.nameEn: Foldable Roll Container YD-L006 (Light-Duty 2-Side L-Shape)
basic.nameZh: 折叠式物流台车 YD-L006（轻量 2 面 L 形）

material.en: Light-duty FOLDABLE Roll Container with ONLY TWO wire-mesh side panels (LEFT + BACK forming L-shape, FRONT and RIGHT completely OPEN for easy two-direction loading) + visible folding hinge at the corner where left and back panels meet + zinc-plated bright silver wire mesh and tube frame + flat zinc-plated wire-mesh bottom deck + rear caster brake
material.zh: 轻量折叠物流笼，仅两片钢丝网侧片（左+背呈 L 形，前右全开放便于双向装卸）+ 左背片相接处可见折叠铰链 + 镀锌亮银钢丝网与钢管框架 + 镀锌钢丝网平板底盘 + 后脚轮带刹车

layers.en: LIGHT-DUTY L-SHAPE design (KEY DIFFERENTIATOR vs L001-L005): only 2 sides enclosed instead of 2/3/4 + lower-cost construction; ideal for: supermarket back-of-house quick restocking (load from front, push out the back), warehouse picking with hand-trucks, simple cart-pool fleets where heavy enclosure isn't needed; folds flat to ~150mm thickness when empty (saves 80% storage space)
layers.zh: 轻量 L 形设计（核心差异化，对比 L001-L005）：仅 2 面围合而非 2/3/4 面 + 成本更低；适合：超市后场快速补货（前装后推）、仓储拣货配合手推叉车、不需重型围合的车队池化使用；空车折叠厚度仅 ~150mm（节省 80% 存储空间）

basic.nameEn: Security Roll Container YD-L007 (Fine-Mesh Anti-Theft + Reinforced Corners)
basic.nameZh: 密封型物流台车 YD-L007（加密网防盗 + 加强角配件）

material.en: SECURITY-GRADE Roll Container with DENSER FINE MESH (mesh openings ~25mm vs standard ~50mm, prevents hand reach-through for anti-theft) + 4-sided full enclosure (LEFT+BACK+RIGHT+FRONT hinged double doors with center padlock latch) + ONE removable adjustable middle wire-mesh shelf + zinc-plated steel frame + REINFORCED METAL CORNER BRACKETS at all 4 top corners (extra angle plates for impact + tamper resistance) + YELLOW plastic caster housings (visually identifies security-tier carts in mixed fleet) + rear caster brake + reinforced bottom cross-beam
material.zh: 安全级物流笼，密网设计（网孔约 25mm 对比普通款 50mm，防手伸入达到防盗等级）+ 四面全围合（左+背+右+前部双开门带中央挂锁）+ 中间一层可拆卸/可调网架 + 镀锌钢架 + 4 角加强金属角配件（顶部 4 角加强角铁，防撞+防撬）+ 黄色塑料脚轮罩（视觉识别车队中的安全级笼车）+ 后脚轮带刹车 + 底部加强横梁

layers.en: SECURITY-TIER positioning (between L004 Lock and standard L003): adds anti-reach-through dense mesh + reinforced corners + bright yellow caster identification + padlock latch (padlock not included); ideal for: pharmaceutical cold-chain, electronics distribution (high-value parcels), jewelry/precious metals transport, cross-city anti-theft cargo handling, hospital pharmacy back-office, cash-handling logistics; the YELLOW casters serve as tamper-evident visual marker in mixed-fleet warehouses
layers.zh: 安全级定位（介于 L004 带锁款和标准 L003 之间）：加密网防手伸 + 加强角防撬 + 醒目黄色脚轮识别 + 挂锁锁扣（挂锁不含）；适合：医药冷链、电子产品配送（高价值包裹）、珠宝/贵金属运输、跨城防盗货物、医院药房后场、现金管理物流；黄色脚轮在混合车队仓库中起到防篡改视觉标识作用

material.en: Zinc-plated bright silver fine-grid steel wire baskets (Phi 4mm vertical + Phi 3mm horizontal MIG-welded) with SLOPED FRONT EDGE (front lip lower than back at 30-degree angle for easy customer grab access) + FOLDING hinges at side panels (each basket folds flat for empty storage, saves 70% space) + BLACK powder-coated flat base platform + 4 swivel TPR caster wheels with rear brake; baskets stack via interlocking corner posts for stable display
material.zh: 镀锌亮银细密钢丝筐体（Phi 4mm 竖丝 + Phi 3mm 横丝 MIG 焊接），斜口设计（前低后高 30 度倾角便于顾客取货）+ 侧板折叠铰链（空筐可折平节省 70% 存储空间）+ 黑色喷塑平板底盘 + 4 个万向 TPR 脚轮后轮带刹车；筐体通过角部立柱互锁稳定堆叠

layers.en: 4-tier stack (custom layer count available) on wheeled base: each tier holds 100 kg of bulk goods (~400 kg total per stack); SLOPED-FRONT design lets customers see and grab products without bending; ideal for: supermarket end-cap promotions, fresh produce displays (apples / oranges / onions / potatoes), clearance bins, wholesale bulk goods, hypermarket promotional islands, seasonal sale displays
layers.zh: 4 层堆叠（可定制层数）于带轮底盘上：每层承重 100 公斤（整组约 400 公斤）；斜口设计让顾客无需弯腰即可看到并取货；适合：超市端头促销、生鲜散装（苹果/橙子/洋葱/土豆）、清仓特卖、批发散货、大卖场促销岛、季节性特价陈列

products.variantSizeNameZh: 铁制仓储笼 YD-SC001（1200x1000x890mm 中大尺寸）

basic.nameEn: Foldable Storage Cage Series (3 Sizes: Compact / Medium / EUR-Pallet Stackable)
basic.nameZh: 铁制仓储笼系列（3 尺寸：紧凑/中大/欧标可堆叠）

material.en: INDUSTRIAL-GRADE foldable storage cage: heavy-gauge zinc-plated steel wire mesh (Phi 6mm vertical + Phi 5mm horizontal MIG-welded) + FOUR foldable side panels with reinforced corner brackets (all sides fold flat when not in use, saves 75 percent storage space) + BLUE HDPE plastic injection-molded pallet base with FOUR-WAY forklift entry slots (Euro pallet compatible) + front panel HINGED HALF-DOOR FLAP at top (partial load/unload without removing full side) + reinforced steel corner posts and top frame
material.zh: 工业级折叠仓储笼：重型镀锌钢丝网（Phi 6mm 竖丝 + Phi 5mm 横丝 MIG 焊接）+ 四面可折叠铰链门带加强角配件（空笼折叠节省 75 percent 仓储空间）+ 蓝色 HDPE 注塑托盘带四向叉车入口（兼容欧标托盘）+ 前面板顶部铰链半门 flap（半装半卸无需拆全门）+ 加强钢制角立柱与顶框

layers.en: MEDIUM-LARGE size 1200x1000 (between EUR pallet 1200x800 and CHEP 1200x1200) - ideal for industrial bulk goods that need slightly wider footprint than standard EUR; load 500-1000 kg per cage; forklift-handled (NOT wheeled); use cases: factory WIP staging, automotive parts shipping, recycling collection, returnable supplier containers, warehouse bulk storage
layers.zh: 中大尺寸 1200x1000（介于欧标 1200x800 和 CHEP 1200x1200 之间）—— 适合略宽于欧标的工业散货；承重 500-1000 公斤每笼；叉车操作（非带轮）；适用场景：工厂在制品暂存、汽车零部件运输、回收收集、可循环供应商容器、仓储散装

layers.en: KEY DIFFERENTIATOR vs SC001/SC005: 4-TIER STACKABLE design saves 75 percent warehouse floor space (1 stack of 4 = footprint of 1 cage); ideal for: automotive parts staging (Tier 1 OEM supplier returnable containers), e-commerce returnable shipping (Amazon/Walmart compatible), warehouse bulk storage with vertical space utilization, EUR/EN 13626 logistics standard
layers.zh: 核心差异化（对比 SC001/SC005）：4 层堆叠设计节省 75 percent 仓库地面（4 笼堆叠占地 = 1 笼）；适合：汽车零部件暂存（Tier 1 OEM 供应商可循环容器）、电商可循环运输（亚马逊/沃尔玛兼容）、垂直空间利用仓储散装、符合 EUR/EN 13626 物流标准

material.en: PURE-STEEL ECONOMY variant of YD-SC001: heavy zinc-plated steel wire mesh (Phi 6mm vertical + Phi 5mm horizontal MIG-welded) + FOUR foldable side panels with reinforced corner brackets + STEEL WIRE-MESH BOTTOM (no plastic pallet) + FOUR L-bracket steel feet at corners (each with base plate, lifts cage approx 50mm off floor for forklift fork tine entry) + front panel hinged HALF-DOOR FLAP
material.zh: YD-SC001 经济款变体：重型镀锌钢丝网（Phi 6mm 竖丝 + Phi 5mm 横丝 MIG 焊接）+ 四面可折叠侧板带加强角配件 + 钢丝网底盘（无塑料托盘）+ 4 个 L 形钢制脚带底板（每脚 50mm 离地空间便于叉车叉齿入位）+ 前面板铰链半门 flap

layers.en: KEY DIFFERENCE vs SC001 (same dimensions): NO PLASTIC PALLET BASE = 25-30 percent LOWER COST + lighter weight (easier manual handling) + better for environments where plastic is not allowed (food/pharma cleanrooms with metal-only policy); trade-off: no integrated 4-way forklift slots, requires forklift fork tines to slip under steel feet (works fine but less convenient than SC001 plastic pallet)
layers.zh: 核心差异（与 SC001 同尺寸）：无塑料托盘 = 成本降低 25-30 percent + 重量更轻（手工搬运更易）+ 适合禁塑环境（食品/医药洁净室仅允许金属）；折衷：无集成四向叉车口，叉车叉齿需从钢脚底部穿过（仍可用但不如 SC001 塑料托盘方便）
layers.de: KEY DIFFERENCE vs SC001 (same dimensions): NO PLASTIC PALLET BASE = 25-30 percent LOWER COST + lighter weight (easier manual handling) + better for environments where plastic is not allowed (food/pharma cleanrooms with metal-only policy); trade-off: no integrated 4-way forklift slots, requires forklift fork tines to slip under steel feet (works fine but less convenient than SC001 plastic pallet)

material.en: VERTICAL STACK variant of YD-SC005: same single cage dimensions but designed for 4-tier vertical stacking; zinc-plated steel wire mesh (Phi 5mm) + REINFORCED CORNER STACKING POSTS at top with male-female interlocking sockets (4 cages lock vertically without crushing) + pure steel construction throughout (no plastic pallet) + L-bracket steel feet only at the BOTTOM cage corners + each tier has front panel hinged HALF-DOOR FLAP for partial access
material.zh: YD-SC005 的垂直堆叠变体：单笼尺寸相同但设计用于 4 层垂直堆叠；镀锌钢丝网（Phi 5mm）+ 顶部 4 角加强堆叠柱（公母互锁插槽，4 笼垂直锁合不压塌）+ 纯钢架（无塑料托盘）+ L 形钢脚仅在最底层笼角部 + 每层独立前面板铰链半门 flap 便于分层取料

layers.en: KEY DIFFERENTIATOR vs SC005 single cage: 4-TIER VERTICAL STACK saves 75 percent floor space (550x550 footprint holds 4 cages worth of contents); ideal for: cleanroom small-parts staging where floor space is premium (semiconductor / pharma WIP), jewelry / electronics component warehouses, automotive parts kitting stations, lab sample vertical archives; total 4-tier system holds approx 400 kg of compact-format goods (100 kg per tier)
layers.zh: 核心差异化（对比 SC005 单笼）：4 层垂直堆叠节省 75 percent 地面（550x550 占地装 4 笼货物）；适合：洁净室小件暂存（半导体/医药在制品）、珠宝/电子零件仓库、汽车配件 kitting 工位、实验室样品垂直归档；整组 4 层系统装载约 400 公斤紧凑货物（每层 100 公斤）

basic.nameEn: Long Dual-Station Checkout Counter YD-R0002
basic.nameZh: 长款双工位收银台 YD-R0002

material.en: High-quality cold-rolled steel frame with powder coating + 304 food-grade stainless steel top + motorized conveyor belt (where applicable) + ABS molded corner protectors + leveling feet at all 4 corners. EXTRA-LONG dual-station counter with main bagging area + auxiliary side table; black stainless steel top with two conveyor zones; white powder-coated body with black trim; ideal for HIGH-TRAFFIC hypermarkets (Carrefour / Walmart) where one cashier handles continuous flow

material.en: High-quality cold-rolled steel frame with powder coating + 304 food-grade stainless steel top + motorized conveyor belt (where applicable) + ABS molded corner protectors + leveling feet at all 4 corners. basic.nameEn: L-Shape Red Corner Counter YD-R0009
basic.nameZh: 红色 L 形转角收银台 YD-R0009

material.en: High-quality cold-rolled steel frame with powder coating + 304 food-grade stainless steel top + motorized conveyor belt (where applicable) + ABS molded corner protectors + leveling feet at all 4 corners. L-SHAPE CORNER CONFIGURATION with bright RED side panels; main 2m conveyor + 600mm side wing for cashier work area; white interior cabinet with shelving; cash drawer cutout on right; ideal for store entrance corners or end-of-aisle positions
material.zh: 优质冷轧钢框架喷塑工艺 + 304 食品级不锈钢台面 + 电动传送带（部分款型）+ ABS 注塑角部防撞 + 4 角调平脚。L 形转角配置，亮红侧板；主 2m 传送带 + 600mm 侧翼工作区；白色内置橱柜带置物层；右侧预留钱箱位；适合店铺入口转角或货架尽头位置

material.en: High-quality cold-rolled steel frame with powder coating + 304 food-grade stainless steel top + motorized conveyor belt (where applicable) + ABS molded corner protectors + leveling feet at all 4 corners. L-SHAPE counter with ELEVATED POS DISPLAY STAND (tall vertical pole holding customer-facing monitor) + 3-DRAWER STORAGE UNIT (receipt paper / coupons / bagging supplies); red body with black accent trim; ideal for membership stores requiring customer screen interaction

material.en: High-quality cold-rolled steel frame with powder coating + 304 food-grade stainless steel top + motorized conveyor belt (where applicable) + ABS molded corner protectors + leveling feet at all 4 corners. STANDARD SUPERMARKET CONFIGURATION; royal blue lower + white upper two-tone panels; black stainless steel top with full-length motorized conveyor; barcode scanner mount on right; the most common supermarket checkout style globally

BOLD ORANGE-WHITE VERTICAL STRIPED design (3 orange + 2 white stripes); black stainless steel top with conveyor; modern retail aesthetic; tall 900mm height (slightly taller than standard 850); ideal for trendy supermarkets / health-food stores
material.zh: 优质冷轧钢框架喷塑工艺 + 304 食品级不锈钢台面 + 电动传送带（部分款型）+ ABS 注塑角部防撞 + 4 角调平脚。醒目橙白竖条纹设计（3 橙 + 2 白）；黑色不锈钢台面带传送带；现代零售风格；900mm 高度（略高于标准 850）；适合潮流超市/健康食品店

basic.nameEn: White Ventilated-Body Counter YD-R0017
basic.nameZh: 白色穿孔通风款收银台 YD-R0017

material.en: High-quality cold-rolled steel frame with powder coating + 304 food-grade stainless steel top + motorized conveyor belt (where applicable) + ABS molded corner protectors + leveling feet at all 4 corners. WHITE rounded body with VENTILATION HOLE PERFORATION pattern (like speaker grille, for equipment cooling); black stainless steel top with red edge trim; modern minimalist style; ideal for stores with built-in refrigerated POS equipment requiring heat dissipation
material.zh: 优质冷轧钢框架喷塑工艺 + 304 食品级不锈钢台面 + 电动传送带（部分款型）+ ABS 注塑角部防撞 + 4 角调平脚。白色圆润机身带穿孔通风设计（音响格栅式，便于设备散热）；黑色不锈钢台面红色饰边；现代极简风；适合内置冷藏 POS 设备需散热的门店

basic.nameEn: Circular Island Counter with Overhead Sign Mount YD-R0018
basic.nameZh: 圆形岛式收银台带顶部灯架 YD-R0018
basic.shortName: Circular Island Counter with Overhead Sign Mount

material.en: High-quality cold-rolled steel frame with powder coating + 304 food-grade stainless steel top + motorized conveyor belt (where applicable) + ABS molded corner protectors + leveling feet at all 4 corners. CIRCULAR ISLAND DESIGN (cylindrical stainless steel base + square overhang countertop, mushroom-style); TALL OVERHEAD POLE with TWO mounting brackets at top (for store sign / security camera / spotlights); designed for store-center self-service islands or premium boutique focal points
material.zh: 优质冷轧钢框架喷塑工艺 + 304 食品级不锈钢台面 + 电动传送带（部分款型）+ ABS 注塑角部防撞 + 4 角调平脚。圆形岛式设计（圆柱不锈钢底座 + 方形悬挑台面，蘑菇造型）；高顶部立柱带 2 个安装支架（店招/监控/聚光灯）；适合店中央自助收银岛或精品店焦点位置

basic.nameEn: Hi-Vis Blue-Yellow Industrial Counter YD-R0019
basic.nameZh: 高识别度蓝黄工业风收银台 YD-R0019

material.en: High-quality cold-rolled steel frame with powder coating + 304 food-grade stainless steel top + motorized conveyor belt (where applicable) + ABS molded corner protectors + leveling feet at all 4 corners. COMPACT 1.8m industrial-style counter; dark navy blue lower body + BRIGHT YELLOW Z-SHAPE accent panel on front (hi-vis safety aesthetic); light grey trim; ideal for hardware stores / DIY centers / industrial supply outlets
material.zh: 优质冷轧钢框架喷塑工艺 + 304 食品级不锈钢台面 + 电动传送带（部分款型）+ ABS 注塑角部防撞 + 4 角调平脚。紧凑型 1.8m 工业风款；深海军蓝下身 + 亮黄 Z 形前面板饰条（高可见度安全风格）；浅灰饰边；适合五金店/DIY 中心/工业用品店

basic.nameEn: Square Single-Station Kiosk Counter YD-R0021

material.en: High-quality cold-rolled steel frame with powder coating + 304 food-grade stainless steel top + motorized conveyor belt (where applicable) + ABS molded corner protectors + leveling feet at all 4 corners. COMPACT SQUARE KIOSK design (NOT a long counter, 1.1m square footprint); multi-tone grey/charcoal/wood geometric panels; black stainless steel top; ideal for convenience stores / self-service kiosks / pop-up shops / express checkout points

material.en: High-quality cold-rolled steel frame with powder coating + 304 food-grade stainless steel top + motorized conveyor belt (where applicable) + ABS molded corner protectors + leveling feet at all 4 corners. BOUTIQUE RETAIL aesthetic; black powder-coated body with 3 horizontal natural-oak wood plank accent strips inset on front face; black stainless steel top with rounded corners; ideal for Apple-Store-style premium electronics / luxury accessories / designer boutiques

basic.nameEn: Cafe Wood Minimalist Counter YD-R008
basic.nameZh: 咖啡店木质极简收银台 YD-R008

material.en: High-quality cold-rolled steel frame with powder coating + 304 food-grade stainless steel top + motorized conveyor belt (where applicable) + ABS molded corner protectors + leveling feet at all 4 corners. CAFE / BAKERY MINIMALIST design; full LIGHT WALNUT WOOD VENEER body (front/sides/end caps); black stainless steel top; subtle geometric triangle cutouts on side ends; warm welcoming aesthetic; ideal for cafes / bakeries / wine shops / artisan retail
material.zh: 优质冷轧钢框架喷塑工艺 + 304 食品级不锈钢台面 + 电动传送带（部分款型）+ ABS 注塑角部防撞 + 4 角调平脚。咖啡/烘焙极简风设计；全身浅胡桃木皮（正面/侧面/端帽）；黑色不锈钢台面；侧端微妙几何三角切口；温暖亲和美学；适合咖啡店/烘焙店/酒铺/手作零售

basic.nameEn: Yellow V-Shape Geometric Counter YD-R009
basic.nameZh: 黄色 V 形几何收银台 YD-R009

material.en: High-quality cold-rolled steel frame with powder coating + 304 food-grade stainless steel top + motorized conveyor belt (where applicable) + ABS molded corner protectors + leveling feet at all 4 corners. TRENDY GEOMETRIC design with bright YELLOW V-SHAPE accent panel on front face (inverted chevron arrow); dark charcoal body; built-in POS register and small display monitor on top; ideal for youth fashion stores / streetwear / urban retail concepts
material.zh: 优质冷轧钢框架喷塑工艺 + 304 食品级不锈钢台面 + 电动传送带（部分款型）+ ABS 注塑角部防撞 + 4 角调平脚。潮流几何设计，正面亮黄 V 形装饰板（倒置 chevron 箭头）；深炭色机身；台面集成 POS 收银机和小显示屏；适合青年时尚店/街头潮牌/城市零售概念店

basic.nameEn: Wood Geometric Triangle-Cut Counter YD-R010
basic.nameZh: 木质几何三角切割收银台 YD-R010

material.en: High-quality cold-rolled steel frame with powder coating + 304 food-grade stainless steel top + motorized conveyor belt (where applicable) + ABS molded corner protectors + leveling feet at all 4 corners. DESIGNER BOUTIQUE aesthetic; warm walnut wood veneer body with 3 BLACK TRIANGULAR INSET PANELS recessed into front face (modern architectural geometric pattern); black stainless steel top with rounded edge trim; ideal for fashion boutiques / designer concept stores / premium accessory shops

desc.en: Bank L/C, escrow via licensed third-party payment gateways and project milestone billing — 100% protection on quality and on-time shipment.

intelligence.c: Retail chain procurement teams, supermarket equipment distributors, warehouse project contractors and store fixture buyers.
Official email, verified client logos, exhibition photos and certificate originals should be collected before final commercial launch.
Lead with verified factory capacity, project customization, on-time delivery and category breadth rather than low price.

sop.c: Ask for store layout, target shelf dimensions, load-bearing requirement, finish color, quantity, destination port and rollout timeline.
Recommend one gondola shelf unit or trolley sample, confirm sample cost, packaging, lead time and freight method before bulk quotation.
Send 3D layout or drawing confirmation, QC checklist and delivery schedule to reduce buyer uncertainty.

whySub.en: Manufacturing capability, project customization and catalogue-level product management for global B2B buyers.
